Welcome to Module 1. In this module, we're going to cover the foundation of your six-figure funnel. Specifically, we're going to be talking about selecting your niche or marketplace and the criteria that you need to use to assess viability. We're going to be talking about something called marketplace sophistication and how to assess that level of sophistication for each of the potential niches or markets that you're considering. We're going to talk about how to assess the competitive landscape. Then we're going to talk about developing your six-figure funnel formula, hook, and promise. Let me tell you, of all of the modules, this module is probably the least exciting for most marketers. It's more strategy than it is tactics, and there's a whole bunch of quote-unquote conceptual information. I've got to tell you that the information that you're going to get in this module is some of the most critical information you will hear throughout the rest of the six-figure funnel formula training. Because your entire six-figure funnel gets built on what you'll learn in the four lessons within Module 1. I highly, highly encourage you to go through these modules, pay close attention, take notes, because you'll be using this information throughout the rest of the modules in the six-figure funnel formula.
